textByHash.78677ea54e7f601f5f68d27e69dcc7facef8bd09: Come with us, human! Commander Veldaban wants a word with you!
textByHash.7adcfc69d5783a997d8f61426b5f82c4c48cdaa8: Halt! By order of the Black Guard, you are under arrest!
textByHash.b78eb0abf96e139f7c4d8084d6eb65a699c9b42f: I'm keeping an eye on you!
